languages.original_text: "You pronounce the words of our speech almost correctly, but you still make errors of intonation. Few humans can master our tongue. Why would you attempt this?"

languages.text: "Ты произносишь слова нашей речи почти правильно, но все еще путаешься в интонациях. Немногие из людей могут освоить наш язык. Зачем это тебе?"
"You pronounce the words of our speech almost correctly, but you still make errors of intonation. Few humans can master our tongue. Why would you attempt this?"
languages.original_text: "Ты произносишь слова нашей речи почти правильно, но все еще путаешься в интонациях. Немногие из людей могут освоить наш язык. Зачем это тебе?"

traits.locale_text: "You pronounce the words of our speech almost correctly, but you still make errors of intonation. Few humans can master our tongue. Why would you attempt this?"
"You pronounce the words of our speech almost correctly, but you still make errors of intonation. Few humans can master our tongue. Why would you attempt this?"
"You pronounce the words of our speech almost correctly, but you still make errors of intonation. Few humans can master our tongue. Why would you attempt this?"

languages.text: «Pronuncias nuestras palabras casi correctamente, pero aún cometes errores de entonación. Pocos humanos pueden dominar nuestra lengua. ¿Por qué lo intentas?».
languages.original_text: "You pronounce the words of our speech almost correctly, but you still make errors of intonation. Few humans can master our tongue. Why would you attempt this?"

traits.locale_text: «Pronuncias nuestras palabras casi correctamente, pero aún cometes errores de entonación. Pocos humanos pueden dominar nuestra lengua. ¿Por qué lo intentas?».

languages.text: 「お前は我らの言葉をほぼ正しく発音するが、それでも抑揚を誤る。我らの言語を習得できる人間はわずかしかいない。なぜそのようなことを試みる？」
languages.original_text: "You pronounce the words of our speech almost correctly, but you still make errors of intonation. Few humans can master our tongue. Why would you attempt this?"

traits.locale_text: 「お前は我らの言葉をほぼ正しく発音するが、それでも抑揚を誤る。我らの言語を習得できる人間はわずかしかいない。なぜそのようなことを試みる？」

languages.text: “你的发音几乎正确，但语调上仍有错误。极少有人类能掌握我们的语言。你又为何尝试？”
languages.original_text: "You pronounce the words of our speech almost correctly, but you still make errors of intonation. Few humans can master our tongue. Why would you attempt this?"

traits.locale_text: “你的发音几乎正确，但语调上仍有错误。极少有人类能掌握我们的语言。你又为何尝试？”

languages.text: "Ihr sprecht die Worte unserer Sprache nahezu korrekt aus, macht aber noch Fehler hinsichtlich der Intonation. Nur wenige Menschen beherrschen unser Zunge. Warum versucht Ihr es überhaupt?"
languages.original_text: "You pronounce the words of our speech almost correctly, but you still make errors of intonation. Few humans can master our tongue. Why would you attempt this?"

traits.locale_text: "Ihr sprecht die Worte unserer Sprache nahezu korrekt aus, macht aber noch Fehler hinsichtlich der Intonation. Nur wenige Menschen beherrschen unser Zunge. Warum versucht Ihr es überhaupt?"

languages.text: « Votre prononciation est presque correcte, mais votre intonation comporte encore des erreurs. Rares sont les humains qui parviennent à maîtriser notre langue. Pourquoi voulez-vous l'apprendre ? »
languages.original_text: "You pronounce the words of our speech almost correctly, but you still make errors of intonation. Few humans can master our tongue. Why would you attempt this?"

traits.locale_text: « Votre prononciation est presque correcte, mais votre intonation comporte encore des erreurs. Rares sont les humains qui parviennent à maîtriser notre langue. Pourquoi voulez-vous l'apprendre ? »

languages.text: "Konuşmamızın sözcüklerini neredeyse doğru telaffuz ediyorsun ama hâlâ tonlama hataları yapıyorsun. Dilimize çok az insan hâkim olabilir. Neden buna kalkışıyorsun?"
languages.original_text: "You pronounce the words of our speech almost correctly, but you still make errors of intonation. Few humans can master our tongue. Why would you attempt this?"

traits.locale_text: "Konuşmamızın sözcüklerini neredeyse doğru telaffuz ediyorsun ama hâlâ tonlama hataları yapıyorsun. Dilimize çok az insan hâkim olabilir. Neden buna kalkışıyorsun?"
